title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Indiabulls Real Estate

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Indiabulls Real Estate
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Indiabulls Real Estate in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Indiabulls Real Estate:
Indiabulls Real Estate is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indiabulls Real Estate!
